criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance productivity features.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and technology blogs.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app to improve productivity.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, user reviews, and technology blogs.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The number of platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Web) on which the app is available.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions and app store listings.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The affordability of the app, considering both free and paid versions.
criteria.sources: Official app pricing information and user reviews.
